title: Hiring Software Engineer at AgroStar Global Group

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at AgroStar Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the AgroStar Global Group family as a Software Engineer in Aurangabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AgroStar Global Group:
AgroStar Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar Global Group!
